title: Center Stage Salad
ingredients: 1 head Boston lettuce, rinsed and spun dry
1 head green leaf lettuce, rinsed and spun dry
4–6 ounces Roquefort cheese, crumbled (or blue cheese or Stilton)
4 slices bacon, cooked crisp and crumbled (optional)
instructions: Tear lettuces into bite-size pieces and place in a large bowl.
Chill the lettuce until ready to serve.
Preheat oven to 250°F and line a jelly roll pan with foil.
In a heavy skillet over low heat, combine sugar, butter, orange juice, salt, cinnamon, cayenne, and mace.
Stir until butter melts and sugar dissolves.
Increase heat to medium, add pecans, and toss until coated.
Spread nuts in a single layer on prepared pan and bake for 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes.
Remove nuts to rack and separate with a fork.
Combine olive oil, raspberry vinegar, shallots, salt, and white pepper in a blender or jar.
Blend or shake vinaigrette until emulsified.
When ready to serve, add cheese, onion, scallions, bacon (if using), and cayenne nuts to the chilled lettuce.
Toss salad with vinaigrette and serve immediately.
notes: Cayenne nuts can be stored in an airtight container up to 5 days or frozen up to 1 month.
Bring cayenne nuts to room temperature before serving.
If cayenne nuts become sticky, reheat on a foil-lined pan at 250°F until crisp.
